name: self-hosted-service-safety
title: Self-Hosted Service Safety
version_notes: Adds privacy-safe deployment and AI-module observability baseline review guidance.

outputs.notes: Standalone skill README copied from first-party module source.
Standalone skill entrypoint copied from first-party module source.
OpenAI platform metadata copied from first-party module source.

skill_creation_review.existing_skill_review: Reviewed current skills before adding self-hosted-service-safety: n8n-agent-rules, n8n-local-setup, windows-localhost-workflows, secure-cicd-installer, ai-coding-agent-rules, and context-preserving-ai-publisher. No existing skill covers this exact non-n8n safety-review trigger without either being too narrow or too broad.
skill_creation_review.trigger: Use only when reviewing or planning non-n8n self-hosted service setup, Docker Compose services, VPS deployment notes, reverse proxies, public ports, DNS/TLS, tunnels, admin panels, backups, public admin/backup paths, honeypot/canary paths, traffic logs, SSH access, firewall exposure, or first-run hardening. Do not use for ordinary app coding, local-only dev servers, or n8n work.
skill_creation_review.decision_reason: Self-Hosted Service Safety has a distinct safety boundary and invocation trigger, so folding it into ai-coding-agent-rules would make the always-adjacent coding rules heavier while hiding the setup/exposure review boundary.
skill_creation_review.unique_value: Forces a short risk review before high-impact local setup or service exposure work that agents might otherwise treat as ordinary setup commands.
skill_creation_review.runtime_footprint: SKILL.md is intentionally short, review-only, and has no required long references or bundled tools; optional detail is not loaded by default.
skill_creation_review.local_assets: No local assets beyond README, SKILL.md, and small platform metadata because the useful behavior is a compact safety review, not an installer or tutorial.
skill_creation_review.output_contract: Return a compact Self-Hosted Service Safety Review with risk level, blocked actions, approval-gated actions, safe first-run plan, required config changes, backup/restore notes, privacy-safe deployment/AI observability baseline, and verification checks before public exposure.
skill_creation_review.anti_bloat_review: The skill is rejected for ordinary coding and model-general advice; it triggers only on setup/exposure/credential/live-system risk and produces a compact review instead of a tutorial.
skill_creation_review.safety_boundary: Review-only by default. Docker, DNS/TLS, tunnels, firewall/public ports, VPS/cloud changes, credentials, production data, or deployment commands require explicit current-turn approval.
skill_creation_review.third_party_audit: not_applicable_first_party; no third-party text or code copied or adapted.
skill_creation_review.publisher_workflow: context-preserving-ai-publisher source-to-surface workflow with first-party _main source, deterministic copy outputs, routing updates, safety matrix updates, sync, and validation.
skill_creation_review.routing: self-hosted-service-safety is routed only for self-hosted-service-safety review/planning tasks involving non-n8n self-hosted services, Docker/VPS setup, public exposure, reverse proxies, tunnels, credentials, or backups.

project.name: Self-Hosted Service Safety
project.summary: Small safety-review skill for non-n8n self-hosted service setup, Docker/VPS plans, reverse proxies, tunnels, public ports, credentials, backups, and first-run hardening.

skill.summary: Small safety-review skill for non-n8n self-hosted service setup, Docker/VPS plans, reverse proxies, tunnels, public ports, credentials, backups, and first-run hardening.
